emptyHeading: Wax kasta wax ku weydii xogtaada
emptySubDefault: Faayl soo geli kadibna weydii su'aal ganacsi oo Ingiriis fudud ah.
aiError: Lama gaari karo AI-ga. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
inputPlaceholder: Weydii su'aal BI ah oo ku saabsan xogtaada… (Enter si aad u dirto)
bizRetail0: Alaabtee ayaan si degdeg ah dib u buuxin karaa?
bizRetail1: Waa maxay badeecada faa'iidada ugu wanaagsan?
bizEcommerce0: SKU-tee ayaa leh heerka soo-celinta ugu sarreeya?
bizEcommerce1: I tus qaybta ugu wax-soo-saarka badan
bizEcommerce2: Waa maxay kharashka fulinta ee dalab kasta?
bizDistributor1: I tus isbeddellada faa'iidada gobol ahaan
bizDistributor2: Halkee ayaa baahida ugu dhaqso badan u korneysaa?
bizDistributor3: Macaamiishee ayaa lacag-bixinta ku dib dhacay?
bizExporter0: Sarrifka lacagta sida uu u saameynayo faa'iidooyinkayga?
bizExporter1: Suuqee ayaa baahida ugu sarreeya leh?
bizExporter2: I tus badeecooyinkayga ugu sarreeya qiime ahaan
bizExporter3: Waa maxay celceliska kharashka shixnad kasta?
